subject: feat(modules): multi-word intent labels + micro-summary system
body:
Phase A: Enhanced intent labels — expanded defaults from 6 to 8
(added condition, declaration; replaced protection with remedy),
increased max length to 60 chars, relaxed normalization to allow
multi-word labels and accented characters for Latin phrases.

Phase B: Micro-summary system — three optional plain-language fields
(summary_does, summary_when, summary_consequence) per module.
Creator fills them via collapsible editor (save-on-blur per field),
counterparty sees them in a summary card above clause content.
Module cards show summary_does instead of content preview when available.

Tags: feature, modules, intents, summaries, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: intent-labels-and-summaries
Semver: minor
